title: 3 PCS Round Foldable Hand Fans, Fruit Style Handheld Folding Fan Portable Cooling Fans for Summer Events, Outdoor Travel, Festival Party Decorations, Game Favors
features: These round folding fans are well made and colorful, with 3 fruit styles: watermelon, kiwi, and orange. They are full of summer flavor and can provide you with coolness anytime and anywhere.

Round fruit fans are made of high-quality polyester and foldable wire, strong and lightweight, with clear patterns, not easy to fade, tear-resistant, open and close smoothly, safe to use, not easy to deform or break.
Round foldable fan unfolded diameter: 21 cm / 8.27 in, folded diameter is about 8 cm / 3.15 in. The small fan takes up little space and can be easily put into a bag or pocket.
Handheld folding fans can be used for daily use in summer, wall decorations, party gifts, photo props, stage performances, etc. They can also be used as a frisbee, which are fun to play with.
Packaging: 3 PCS fruit style folding hand fans.
description: Product Description Round Foldable Hand Fans Specifications: Material: Polyester and foldable wire Style: Watermelon, kiwi, orange Color: As shown in the picture Unfolded diameter: 21 cm / 8.27 in Features: 1.Our foldable flying disc fan pattern incorporates fruit elements, with vivid design and bright colors. It is easy to fold and unfold, suitable for use in hot weather. 2.The round folding fan is very small and flat after folding, and does not take up space in the bag. It also comes with a hanging chain design for easy hanging. 3.The cute round little hand fans not only create a breeze, but also play flying disc with friends. Take them to outdoor activities! Package included: 3 PCS round folding hand fabric fans. See More
